name: Tangerine Curd
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the juices, zest, sugar, and butter in a saucepan.
2. Heat over medium until boiling.
3. In a separate bowl, beat the egg yolks until liquid.
4. Gradually add 1/4 of the hot mixture to the yolks.
5. Return the remaining liquid to a boil and stir gently.
6. Beat the yolk mixture into the hot liquid until combined.
7. Continue stirring until thickened slightly for about 2 minutes.
8. Do not allow the curd to boil or it will scramble.
9. Pour into a clean bowl, cover with plastic wrap, and chill.
Makes 1 Cup
PETER KUMP - PRODIGY GUEST CHEFS COOKBOOK
